query:
SELECT 
  c.id,
  c.name,
  COUNT(DISTINCT u.id) as usuarios,
  COUNT(DISTINCT s.id) as vendas,
  COUNT(DISTINCT g.id) as metas
FROM companies c
LEFT JOIN users u ON c.id = u.companyId
LEFT JOIN sales s ON c.id = s.companyId
LEFT JOIN goals g ON c.id = g.companyId
GROUP BY c.id, c.name
ORDER BY usuarios DESC, vendas DESC, metas DESC;
